# Riverse — River Algorithm

> A personal AI agent that runs on your own machine — persistent memory, offline cognition, grows with every conversation. All data stays local.

## What is Riverse?

Riverse is an open-source personal AI agent built on the River Algorithm. Unlike cloud-based AI memory systems (ChatGPT Memory, Claude Memory) that store flat lists of facts, Riverse uses a multi-layered profiling system inspired by how rivers deposit sediment:

- **Flow**: Conversations stream through like water, key information is extracted in real-time.
- **Sediment**: Facts settle into a user profile, progressing from "suspected" → "confirmed" → "established" through multi-turn verification.
- **Purify**: Offline consolidation (Sleep) resolves contradictions, expires outdated info, and strengthens validated facts.

## Key Features

- Persistent local memory with temporal awareness
- Contradiction detection and dispute resolution
- Offline cognitive consolidation (Sleep pipeline)
- Multi-channel support: Telegram, Discord, REST API, WebSocket, CLI, Web Dashboard
- Multi-modal input: text, voice, images
- Proactive engagement based on user patterns
- Custom tools and skills system
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration
- Runs with any OpenAI-compatible LLM or local Ollama models
- All data stored locally — never sent to cloud

## Use Cases

- Personal AI assistant that truly knows you over time
- Local-first alternative to cloud AI memory
- Cross-platform conversation profile aggregation
- Batch extraction of personal profiles from ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini history (RiverHistory edition)

## Tech Stack

- Python 3.10+
- PostgreSQL 16 (or SQLite via riverse SDK)
- Ollama / OpenAI-compatible API
- FastAPI + WebSocket
- python-telegram-bot / discord.py

- GitHub: https://github.com/wangjiake/JKRiver
